messages.content: Write a response to the following email letting them know that I have finally managed to get my recommenders and now have a complete application:

Dear [Sender],

I wanted to provide you with an update regarding my application. After some time and effort invested in reaching out to potential recommenders, I am pleased to report that I have successfully secured all the letters required, and my application is now complete!

I appreciate your interest and support throughout this process and am thankful for the time you took to assist me in securing my recommenders. Your guidance has been invaluable.

Once again, thank you for your help, and I look forward to keeping you updated on any news regarding my application.

All the best,

[Your Name]
Write that reply to THIS email:
I apologize, but I cannot complete this task as there is no email provided for me to respond to. Please provide me with the email that you would like me to reply to.

Good afternoon, Jo!

Thank you for your application to the FSU School of Information and for your patience in hearing back from us. At this time, your application does not meet our admission requirements. However, we would still like to consider your application for the fall 2023 semester. In order to do so, please provide at least two letters of recommendation (we recommend at least one be from an academic source and another from a professional source; we can accept two professional recommenders if an academic one is not available). There is a part of your FSU Graduate Application ( https://connect.fsu.edu/apply/status ) in which you can submit recommenders' information; the application system will email them for you with instructions on how to submit the letter. Please let us know when you have done so and feel free to reach out if you have any further questions!

 

Best,




<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
Graduate Admissions Coordinator
School of Information
Florida State University

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this email finds you well. Thank you for getting back to me regarding my application to the FSU School of Information, and for considering my application for the fall 2023 semester despite it not meeting the admission requirements at this time.

I appreciate your guidance on providing at least two letters of recommendation to support my application. I have managed to secure the required letters of recommendation, one from an academic source and another from a professional source, and have submitted their information via the FSU Graduate Application portal as advised.

Thank you for your time and consideration, and I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Write a reply to the previous email I attached to let her know that I got the additional materials needed for my application submitted

Dear [<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to provide an update on my application to the FSU School of Information. I am pleased to inform you that I have submitted the two additional letters of recommendation as you instructed me to.

Thank you for your patience and guidance throughout this process, and for giving me the opportunity to complete my application. I remain deeply interested in pursuing a degree at the School of Information and remain hopeful that my application meets your acceptance criteria.

Please let me know if there is any further information needed from my end. I look forward to hearing back from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Write a thank you email to Dr. Kowal for writing me a recommendation letter, note that I appreciate how quick the turnaround was and how I’ve enjoyed having her as a professor.

Dear Dr. Kowal,

I am writing to express my heartfelt thanks for taking the time to write me a recommendation letter. Your support means a lot to me, and I am grateful for your kindness and willingness to help me in my academic and professional pursuits.

I am most appreciative of how quickly you completed this letter, especially considering the numerous responsibilities that you have as a professor. It helped me so much in meeting my application deadline. I am privileged to have you as my professor and appreciate how approachable and engaging you have been.

Once again, thank you for supporting me as I pursue my academic and professional goals. I am honored to have your confidence and encouragement.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
Give me an e-mail subject for this email
"Thank You for Your Recommendation Letter, Dr. Kowal"
Give a subject line for this email
"Follow-up on Interview for the Marketing Position"

Write a thank you email to Dr. Kowal for writing me a recommendation letter, note that I appreciate how quick the turnaround was and how I’ve enjoyed having her as a professor. Include a subject line.

Subject: Thank You for Your Recommendation Letter, Dr. Kowal

Dear Dr. Kowal,

I am writing to express my heartfelt thanks for taking the time to write me a recommendation letter. Your support means a lot to me, and I am grateful for your kindness and willingness to help me in my academic and professional pursuits.

I am most appreciative of how quickly you completed this letter, especially considering the numerous responsibilities that you have as a professor. It helped me so much in meeting my application deadline. I am privileged to have you as my professor and appreciate how approachable and engaging you have been.

Once again, thank you for supporting me as I pursue my academic and professional goals. I am honored to have your confidence and encouragement.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
